suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchOrders'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchOrders, order_id, page]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'initialBomId', 'initialQty', 'isEditing', 'replace', 'setValue', and 'watch'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'setValue' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [watchedBomId, watchedQty, watchedLoss, isEditing, initialBomId, setValue, watch, initialQty, replace]

fix.text: [watchedBomId, watchedQty, watchedLoss, isEditing, initialBomId, setValue, watch, initialQty, replace]

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'onChange' and 'value'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onChange' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [onChange, rollCodeInput, value]

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Move your React context(s) to a separate file.
Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'display'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [display, value]
